name: Up & Down Indoor Golf
about: Up & Down Indoor Golf is a premier private golf simulator facility in Grove City, OH, offering an exclusive 24/7 golfing experience for members and guests. The venue features two top-of-the-line simulator bays equipped with Foresight Falcon launch monitors and access to 40 world-renowned courses, including St. Andrews and Pebble Beach. Membership provides flexible access with two levels, Silver and Gold, each offering different benefits like advanced booking and guest options. The facility is designed for golfers looking for a dedicated space to practice, play, or improve their game in a private environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive 24/7 access to private simulator bays
Top-tier Foresight Falcon launch monitors with FSX Pro Performance Insight
Access to 40 world-class courses including St. Andrews and Pebble Beach

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated.
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line launch monitor with FSX Pro Performance Insight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention a kitchen or bar service, so bringing your own food and drinks may be permitted, but this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1.5 to 2 hours per player, depending on the course and simulator software.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is a private golf simulator facility focused on adult golfers and does not advertise itself as kid-friendly.
